framework.name: OpenID Agentic Identity Whitepaper
framework.description: OpenID Foundation's Oct 2025 whitepaper acknowledges OAuth 2.1 works for single trust domains but 'may fall short' for cross-domain, async, and multi-hop scenarios. Explicitly names recursive delegation, transitive trust, and multi-user agents as unsolved. Recommends composing existing standards via interoperability profiles (IPSIE) rather than new protocols.
framework.raw_quote: Existing OAuth 2.1 frameworks, when used with AI agents, work well within single trust domains with synchronous agent operations... but may fall short in scenarios that are cross-domain, highly autonomous, or asynchronous

source.title: Identity Management for Agentic AI - OpenID
